title: Simple Quarries
description: A Fabric quarry mod with fuel, pickaxe-based mining, upgrades, filters, chunk loading, and automation support for hands-free resource gathering.
body:
# Simple Quarries Plus

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/467f878546f1d51955b960bd4db9861a0fdfeef1.jpeg)

Automated mining, but with enough friction to still feel like Minecraft.

Simple Quarries Plus adds a quarry block that mines vertical shafts using fuel and pickaxes, with upgrade paths, filters, automation hooks, and chunk loading built in.

## Features
- Automated vertical mining
- Fuel-based operation
- Uses inserted pickaxes, including enchantments
- Area upgrades and speed upgrades
- Item filters with whitelist/blacklist modes
- Redstone pause support
- Automatic chunk loading while active
- Hopper and comparator compatibility

## Why use it
- Great mid-game automation
- Better than overpowered instant quarries
- Fits tech-lite and vanilla+ progression

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
